question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct — all six are the correct P3 formats for their respective file types.

Please write Sprint 10 Week 1 retrospective notes in Markdown format, save to day30/. Include sections for: what went well, what could be improved, action items (with owners and due dates), and team morale rating (1-5). Add the retrospective date.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 11:29 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct — all six are the correct P3 formats for their respective file types.

Please write Sprint 10 Week 1 retrospective notes in Markdown format, save to day30/. Include sections for: what went well, what could be improved, action items (with owners and due dates), and team morale rating (1-5). Add the retrospective date.

2026-04-24T09:30:00+08:00 - sprint10_board.json updated: T-501, T-502 marked completed
2026-03-18T11:28:40+08:00 - staging_deployment_notes.md created for 2026-04-27 staging deployment

<|tool_calls_section_begin|> <|tool_call_begin|> callkimi00ef88459g0i5p1o1g0o7ed5 {"file_path": "day30/20260424_sprint10_week1_retrospective.md", "content": "---
created_at: 2026-04-24T09:30:00+08:00
sprint: 10
week: 1
type: retrospective
---

# Sprint 10 Week 1 Retrospective

**Retrospective Date:** 2026-04-24

## What Went Well

- Both core tasks (T-501, T-502) completed on schedule
- Export endpoints (JSON/CSV) successfully implemented and tested
- Sprint metrics aggregation service deployed to staging without issues
- Team collaboration remained strong with daily standups running efficiently
- Performance baseline maintained within acceptable thresholds

## What Could Be Improved

- Integration testing took longer than estimated due to environment sync issues
- Documentation updates lagged behind code changes
- Cross-team communication on API contract changes could be more proactive
- Error handling in export endpoints needs more robust edge case coverage

## Action Items

| Item | Owner | Due Date |
|------|-------|----------|
| Implement automated environment synchronization script | Bai | 2026-04-28T09:00:00+08:00 |
| Create API contract change notification workflow | Alex Zhang | 2026-04-29T09:00:00+08:00 |
| Add comprehensive edge case tests for export endpoints | Chen | 2026-05-01T09:00:00+08:00 |
| Establish documentation-first development guideline | Dana | 2026-04-27T09:00:00+08:00 |

## Team Morale

**Rating:** 4/5

The team is energized by the successful completion of Sprint 10 Week 1 deliverables. Minor frustrations around environment issues were offset by strong collaboration and visible progress.
"} <|tool_call_end|> <|tool_call_begin|> callkimi00ef88459g0i5p1o1g0o7ed6 {"command": "echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S+08:00') - sprint10_week1_retrospective.md created with action items and morale rating" >> day30/done.log"} <|tool_call_end|> <|tool_calls_section_end|>
